title: NTURobotLearningLab/DIFO
abstract:
The Official PyTorch implementation of DIFO: Diffusion Imitation from Observations (NeurIPS'24).

# [NeurIPS'24] DIFO: Diffusion Imitation from Observations The Official PyTorch implementation of [**DIFO: Diffusion Imitation from Observations (NeurIPS'24)**](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2410.05429). [Bo-Ruei Huang](https://borueihuang.com), [Chun-Kai Yang](https://yck1130.github.io), [Chun-Mao Lai](https://www.mecoli.net), [Dai-Jie Wu](https://jaywu109.github.io/), [Shao-Hua Sun](https://shaohua0116.github.io) [Robot Learning Lab](https://nturll.netlify.app/about), [National Taiwan University](https://www.ntu.edu.tw/) [[`Paper`]](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2410.05429) [[`Website`]](https://nturobotlearninglab.github.io/DIFO/) DIFO is a novel framework for imitation learning from observations that combines adversarial imitation learning with inverse dynamics regularization. It enables learning from expert observations without requiring expert actions. ## Installation ### Environment Setup - Python 3.10+ - [MuJoCo](https://github.com/deepmind/mujoco) 2.1+ - Physics engine ### Wandb Setup Setup [Weights & Biases](https://wandb.ai/site) by first logging in with `wandb login `. Alternatively, you can instead log to stdout by setting `log_format_strs = ["stdout"]` in `scripts/ingredients/logging.py`. ## Download Datasets Download the datasets from the Google Drive to the `datasets/` directory. ## Training We provide the configuration YAML files for training DIFO and other baselines in the `exp_configs/` directory. Including 7 tasks: - `point_maze`: PointMaze - `ant_maze`: AntMaze - `walker`: Walker - `fetch_push`: FetchPush - `door`: AdroitDoor - `kitchen`: OpenMicrowave - `car_racing`: CarRacing (Image-based) and 11 algorithms: - `difo`: DIFO - `difo-na`: DIFO-NA - `difo-uncond`: DIFO-Uncond - `bc`: BC - `bco`: BCO - `gaifo`: GAIfO - `AIRLfO`: AIRLfO - `waifo`: WAILfO - `ot-lfo`: OT (LfO) - `iq-lfo`: IQ-Learn (LfO) - `depo`: DePO ### Wandb Sweep You can run the training scripts with Wandb sweep with the following commands: ### Single Run If you prefer to run a single experiment
abstract_zh: DIFO 是一种新颖的从观测中进行模仿学习的框架，它结合了对抗性模仿学习与逆动力学正则化。该方法无需专家动作，仅通过专家观测即可进行学习。
tldr_zh: 结合对抗模仿与逆动力学正则化，仅从观测学习专家行为。
cover_zh: 不用专家动作也能学｜这个模仿学习框架只看观测就够

judge.reason: NeurIPS'24 官方实现，从观测中模仿学习的扩散模型，含多种任务和基线。
